title: Migration, Crime and Education Analytics Project
text:
yokk
The study focuses on three main questions:

How does migration change across provinces?
Is there a relationship between crime counts and migration?
How are education levels related to crime indicators?

title: Migration, Crime and Education Analytics Project
text:
yokk
The study focuses on three main questions:

How does migration change across provinces?
Is there a relationship between crime counts and migration?
How are education levels related to crime indicators?

title: Migration, Crime and Education Analytics Project
text:
Main Methods

Data cleaning and transformation
Correlation analysis
Linear regression
Net migration analysis
Time series forecasting with ARIMA/SARIMA
Heatmap visualization for education and crime indicators

title: Migration, Crime and Education Analytics Project
text:
Tools Used

R
dplyr
tidyr
ggplot2
forecast
Quarto

title: Migration, Crime and Education Analytics Project
text:
This project analyzes the relationship between migration, crime statistics, and education levels across Turkish provinces.
The study focuses on three main questions:

How does migration change across provinces?
Is there a relationship between crime counts and migration?
How are education levels related to crime indicators?
